case_title: MONZO MARIA E. VS MUNGUIA JOSE A.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-30-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-20-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
UNABLE TO SERVE JOSE MUNGUIA FOR 11-30-92 HRG.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONZO MARIA E. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MUNGUIA JOSE A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

UNTIMELY POS. NOT SERVED 10 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE.
